nasb.text: Why have You broken down its hedges, So that all who pass that way pick its fruit?

esv.text: Why then have you broken down its walls, so that all who pass along the way pluck its fruit?

cnv.text: 你為甚麼拆毀它的籬笆， 任由所有過路的人採摘呢？

ccb.text: 你为何拆毁了它的篱笆， 让路人随意摘取葡萄呢？

csbs.text: 你为什么毁坏它的围墙， 以致所有过路的人都去摘取呢？
